sentences.sentence: In 2016, the British professional tennis player Andy Murray was ranked as the world's number one.
sentences.translation: 2016年，英国职业网球运动员安迪·穆雷被评为世界第一。

structure.text: the British professional tennis player Andy Murray

difficult_points: was ranked 是被动语态，表示穆雷被排在某个名次。
as the world's number one 说明排名结果，而不是身份职位。
the British professional tennis player Andy Murray 中前面的名词短语说明人物身份。

sentences.sentence: It was an incredible achievement by any standard—made even more remarkable by the fact that he did this during a period considered to be one of the strongest in the sport's history, competing against the likes of Rafael Nadal, Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic, to name just a few.
sentences.translation: 无论按什么标准看，这都是一项了不起的成就；更值得注意的是，他是在网球史上被认为最强的时期之一做到这一点的，当时他要与拉斐尔·纳达尔、罗杰·费德勒和诺瓦克·德约科维奇等人竞争，这里仅举几例。

structure.text: It was an incredible achievement by any standard
made even more remarkable by the fact
that he did this during a period considered to be one of the strongest in the sport's history
considered to be one of the strongest in the sport's history
competing against the likes of Rafael Nadal, Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic

difficult_points: 破折号后的 made... 是过去分词短语，补充说明成就为何更突出。
the fact 后的 that 从句解释具体事实。
considered to be... 修饰 period，说明那个时期的竞争强度。
competing against... 补充穆雷在该时期面对的对手。

sentences.sentence: Yet five years previously, he had been regarded as a talented outsider who entered but never won the major tournaments.
sentences.translation: 然而在五年前，他还被视为一位有天赋的局外竞争者，参加过重大赛事却从未夺冠。

structure.text: had been regarded as a talented outsider
who entered but never won the major tournaments

difficult_points: Yet 表示与上一句世界第一的成就形成转折。
had been regarded 使用过去完成时被动语态，回到2016年前的评价。
who 引导定语从句，修饰 a talented outsider。
entered but never won 形成对比，说明他参赛但未夺冠。

sentences.sentence: Of the changes that account for this transformation, one was visible and widely publicised: in 2011, Murray invited former number one player Ivan Lendl onto his coaching team—a valuable addition that had a visible impact on the player's playing style.
sentences.translation: 在解释这一转变的各种变化中，有一个变化显而易见并被广泛报道：2011年，穆雷邀请前世界第一伊万·伦德尔加入他的教练团队——这是一次有价值的补充，对这位球员的打法产生了明显影响。

structure.text: Of the changes that account for this transformation
one was visible and widely publicised
in 2011, Murray invited former number one player Ivan Lendl onto his coaching team
a valuable addition that had a visible impact on the player's playing style

difficult_points: Of the changes... 是范围状语，one 指这些变化中的一个。
account for 表示解释原因，不是“账户”。
冒号后具体说明 visible and widely publicised 的变化是什么。
破折号后的同位语评价 Ivan Lendl 加入教练团队的作用。

sentences.sentence: Another change was so subtle as to pass more or less unnoticed.
sentences.translation: 另一个变化则非常细微，几乎没有被注意到。

structure.text: as to pass more or less unnoticed

difficult_points: Another change 与上一句的 one 对应，引出第二个变化。
so subtle as to... 表示“细微到足以……”。
more or less unnoticed 表示几乎未被注意。

sentences.sentence: Like many players, Murray has long preferred a racket that consists of two types of string: one for the mains (verticals) and another for the crosses (horizontals).
sentences.translation: 和许多球员一样，穆雷长期偏爱一种由两类线组成的球拍：一种用于主线（竖线），另一种用于横线。

structure.text: that consists of two types of string
one for the mains (verticals) and another for the crosses (horizontals)

difficult_points: has long preferred 使用现在完成时，说明这一偏好持续已久。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 racket。
冒号后用 one...another... 解释 two types of string。
mains 和 crosses 后的括号分别说明线的方向。

sentences.sentence: While he continued to use natural string in the crosses, in 2012 he switched to a synthetic string for the mains.
sentences.translation: 虽然他继续在横线中使用天然线，但在2012年，他把主线换成了合成线。

structure.text: While he continued to use natural string in the crosses
switched to a synthetic string for the mains

difficult_points: While 引导让步/对比从句，突出横线和主线材料不同。
continued to use 表示保持原有做法。
switched to 表示从原来材料改用合成线。

sentences.sentence: A small change, perhaps, but its importance should not be underestimated.
sentences.translation: 这或许只是一个小变化，但它的重要性不应被低估。

structure.text: but its importance should not be underestimated

difficult_points: A small change 是省略表达，完整含义是“这或许是一个小变化”。
but 表示转折，强调小变化仍然重要。
should not be underestimated 是情态动词加被动语态。

sentences.sentence: The modification that Murray made is just one of a number of options available to players looking to tweak their rackets in order to improve their games.
sentences.translation: 穆雷所做的这种改动，只是球员可选择的许多方案之一；这些球员希望调整球拍，以提升比赛表现。

structure.text: is just one of a number of options
available to players looking to tweak their rackets
in order to improve their games

difficult_points: that Murray made 是定语从句，修饰 modification。
one of a number of options 表示众多选项之一。
looking to tweak their rackets 是现在分词短语，修饰 players。
in order to 表示调整球拍的目的。

expressions.text: one of a number of options

sentences.sentence: "Touring professionals have their rackets customised to their specific needs," says Colin Triplow, a UK-based professional racket stringer.
sentences.translation: 英国职业球拍穿线师科林·特里普洛说：“巡回赛职业球员会按照自己的具体需求定制球拍。”

structure.text: "Touring professionals have their rackets customised to their specific needs,"

difficult_points: have their rackets customised 是使役结构，表示请别人或让专业流程完成定制。
to their specific needs 表示定制要符合个人具体需求。
逗号后的 a UK-based professional racket stringer 是 Colin Triplow 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: "It's a highly important part of performance maximisation."
sentences.translation: “这是实现表现最大化中非常重要的一部分。”

structure.text: a highly important part of performance maximisation

difficult_points: It's 指代前一句的球拍定制。
highly important 强调这种定制对表现提升的重要性。
performance maximisation 是名词化表达，表示最大化竞技表现。

sentences.sentence: Consequently, the specific rackets used by the world's elite are not actually readily available to the public; rather, each racket is individually made to suit the player who uses it.
sentences.translation: 因此，世界顶尖选手所使用的特定球拍实际上并不容易向公众买到；相反，每一支球拍都是单独制作的，以适合使用它的球员。

structure.text: the specific rackets used by the world's elite
are not actually readily available to the public
rather, each racket is individually made to suit the player who uses it

difficult_points: Consequently 表示前文定制需求带来的结果。
used by the world's elite 是过去分词短语，修饰 rackets。
rather 表示不是面向公众售卖，而是单独制作。
who uses it 修饰 the player，it 指 each racket。

sentences.sentence: Take the US professional tennis players Mike and Bob Bryan, for example: "We're very particular with our racket specifications," they say.
sentences.translation: 以美国职业网球选手迈克和鲍勃·布赖恩为例，他们说：“我们对球拍规格非常讲究。”

structure.text: Take the US professional tennis players Mike and Bob Bryan, for example
"We're very particular with our racket specifications,"
very particular with our racket specifications

difficult_points: Take...for example 是举例表达，引出具体球员。
冒号后接直接引语，说明这对球员对球拍规格的态度。
be particular with 表示对某事要求细致、讲究。

sentences.sentence: "All our rackets are sent from our manufacturer to Tampa, Florida, where our frames go through a . . . thorough customisation process."
sentences.translation: “我们所有的球拍都会从制造商那里送到佛罗里达州坦帕，在那里我们的拍框会经过一个……彻底的定制过程。”

structure.text: are sent from our manufacturer to Tampa, Florida
where our frames go through a . . . thorough customisation process
go through a . . . thorough customisation process

difficult_points: are sent 是被动语态，说明球拍被送往定制地点。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 Tampa, Florida。
. . . 是原文中的停顿/省略标记，属于直接引语内容。
go through 表示经历一个过程。

sentences.sentence: They explain how they have adjusted not only racket length, but even experimented with different kinds of paint.
sentences.translation: 他们解释说，他们不仅调整了球拍长度，甚至还尝试了不同种类的涂料。

structure.text: how they have adjusted not only racket length, but even experimented with different kinds of paint
not only racket length, but even experimented with different kinds of paint

difficult_points: how 引导宾语从句，说明他们解释的内容。
have adjusted 使用现在完成时，表示这些调整已经发生。
not only...but even... 强调调整范围从长度扩展到涂料。

sentences.sentence: The rackets they use now weigh more than the average model and also have a denser string pattern (i.e. more crosses and mains).
sentences.translation: 他们现在使用的球拍比普通型号更重，而且线床也更密（也就是有更多横线和主线）。

structure.text: weigh more than the average model
and also have a denser string pattern

difficult_points: The rackets 后省略关系词，they use now 修饰 rackets。
weigh 和 have 并列，共用主语 The rackets。
i.e. 引出解释，说明 denser string pattern 的具体含义。

sentences.sentence: The primary reason for these modifications is simple: as the line between winning and losing becomes thinner and thinner, even these slight changes become more and more important.
sentences.translation: 这些改动的主要原因很简单：随着胜负之间的界限越来越细微，即便这些小变化也变得越来越重要。

structure.text: The primary reason for these modifications
as the line between winning and losing becomes thinner and thinner
even these slight changes become more and more important

difficult_points: 冒号后解释 primary reason 的具体内容。
as 引导时间/伴随状语从句，表示随着胜负差距变小。
thinner and thinner 与 more and more important 都是比较级重复，表示程度持续变化。

expressions.text: the line between winning and losing

sentences.sentence: As a result, players and their teams are becoming increasingly creative with the modifications to their rackets as they look to maximise their competitive advantage.
sentences.translation: 因此，球员及其团队在球拍改装方面变得越来越有创造力，因为他们希望最大化自己的竞争优势。

structure.text: are becoming increasingly creative with the modifications to their rackets
as they look to maximise their competitive advantage

difficult_points: As a result 表示前一句胜负差距变小带来的结果。
are becoming 使用现在进行时，说明创造性正在增强。
as 引导原因/伴随从句，解释他们改装球拍的目标。
look to maximise 表示希望或试图最大化。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在……方面越来越有创造力

sentences.sentence: Racket modifications mainly date back to the 1970s, when the amateur German tennis player Werner Fischer started playing with the so-called spaghetti-strung racket.
sentences.translation: 球拍改装主要可以追溯到20世纪70年代，当时德国业余网球运动员维尔纳·费舍尔开始使用所谓的“意大利面穿线”球拍。

structure.text: when the amateur German tennis player Werner Fischer started playing with the so-called spaghetti-strung racket

difficult_points: date back to 表示起源或可追溯到某一时期。
when 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明20世纪70年代发生的事。
so-called 表示“所谓的”，引出一种特殊球拍名称。

sentences.sentence: It created a string bed that generated so much topspin that it was quickly banned by the International Tennis Federation.
sentences.translation: 它形成了一种线床，能产生如此大的上旋，以至于很快被国际网球联合会禁止。

structure.text: that it was quickly banned by the International Tennis Federation

difficult_points: It 指代 spaghetti-strung racket。
第一个 that 引导定语从句，修饰 string bed。
so much...that... 构成结果结构，说明上旋大到导致禁用。
was banned 是被动语态，说明禁令由国际网联实施。

sentences.sentence: However, within a decade or two, racket modification became a regularity.
sentences.translation: 然而，在一二十年内，球拍改装变成了一种常态。
difficult_points: However 与上一句被禁形成转折，说明改装并未因此消失。
within a decade or two 表示在一二十年内。
became a regularity 表示从特殊做法变成常见现象。

sentences.sentence: Today it is, in many ways, an aspect of the game that is equal in significance to nutrition or training.
sentences.translation: 如今，从许多方面看，它已经成为网球运动中一个重要性可与营养或训练相当的方面。

structure.text: is, in many ways, an aspect of the game
that is equal in significance to nutrition or training

difficult_points: it 指代 racket modification。
in many ways 是插入语，限定评价角度。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 an aspect of the game。
equal in significance to 表示重要性与……相当。

sentences.sentence: Modifications can be divided into two categories: those to the string bed and those to the racket frame.
sentences.translation: 改装可以分为两类：针对线床的改装和针对球拍框的改装。

structure.text: can be divided into two categories
those to the string bed and those to the racket frame

difficult_points: can be divided 是被动语态，说明分类方式。
冒号后具体列出 two categories。
those 分别指 modifications，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: The former is far more common than the latter: the choice of the strings and the tension with which they are installed is something that nearly all professional players experiment with.
sentences.translation: 前者比后者常见得多：线的选择以及安装时的张力，是几乎所有职业球员都会尝试调整的东西。

structure.text: The former is far more common than the latter
the choice of the strings and the tension with which they are installed
that nearly all professional players experiment with

difficult_points: The former 指线床改装，the latter 指拍框改装。
冒号后解释线床改装为何更常见。
with which 引导定语从句，修饰 tension。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 something。

sentences.sentence: They will continually change it depending on various factors including the court surface, climatic conditions, and game styles.
sentences.translation: 他们会根据各种因素不断改变它，包括场地表面、气候条件和比赛风格。

structure.text: including the court surface, climatic conditions, and game styles

difficult_points: They 指代 nearly all professional players。
it 指上一句中的 the choice of the strings and the tension。
depending on... 说明改变线和张力所依据的因素。
including 后列举具体因素。

sentences.sentence: Some will even change it depending on how they feel at the time.
sentences.translation: 有些人甚至会根据当时自己的感觉来改变它。

structure.text: depending on how they feel at the time
how they feel at the time

difficult_points: Some 指部分职业球员。
even 强调这种调整依据甚至可以非常主观。
how they feel at the time 是嵌入式疑问从句，作 depending on 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: At one time, all tennis rackets were strung with natural gut made from the outer layer of sheep or cow intestines.
sentences.translation: 曾经，所有网球拍都用由羊或牛肠外层制成的天然肠线穿线。

structure.text: made from the outer layer of sheep or cow intestines

difficult_points: At one time 表示过去曾经的情况。
were strung 是被动语态，说明球拍被穿上线。
made from... 修饰 natural gut，说明材料来源。

sentences.sentence: This all changed in the early 1990s with the development of synthetic strings that were cheaper and more durable.
sentences.translation: 随着更便宜、更耐用的合成线的发展，这一切在20世纪90年代初发生了变化。

structure.text: with the development of synthetic strings
that were cheaper and more durable

difficult_points: This all 指前文所有球拍使用天然肠线的情况。
with the development of... 表示变化发生的伴随原因。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 synthetic strings。

sentences.sentence: They are made from three materials: nylon (relatively durable and affordable), Kevlar (too stiff to be used alone) or co-polyester (polyester combined with additives that enhance its performance).
sentences.translation: 它们由三种材料制成：尼龙（相对耐用且价格适中）、凯夫拉（太硬，不能单独使用）或共聚酯（聚酯与能提升其性能的添加剂结合而成）。

structure.text: nylon (relatively durable and affordable), Kevlar (too stiff to be used alone) or co-polyester (polyester combined with additives that enhance its performance)
combined with additives that enhance its performance

difficult_points: They 指代 synthetic strings。
冒号后列举三种材料，并用括号说明各自特点。
too stiff to be used alone 是 too...to... 结构，表示凯夫拉硬到不能单独使用。
that enhance its performance 修饰 additives。

expressions.text: too stiff to be used alone

sentences.sentence: Even so, many professional players continue to use a "hybrid set-up", where a combination of both synthetic and natural strings are used.
sentences.translation: 即便如此，许多职业球员仍继续使用一种“混合配置”，也就是同时使用合成线和天然线的组合。

structure.text: where a combination of both synthetic and natural strings are used
a combination of both synthetic and natural strings

difficult_points: Even so 表示即使合成线出现，仍有球员保留混合使用。
hybrid set-up 加引号，说明这是特定配置名称。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，解释 hybrid set-up 的含义。
are used 是被动语态，说明两类线被组合使用。

sentences.sentence: Of the synthetics, co-polyester is by far the most widely used.
sentences.translation: 在各种合成线中，共聚酯是迄今使用最广泛的。

structure.text: is by far the most widely used

difficult_points: Of the synthetics 表示在合成线这一范围内。
by far 强调最高级程度，表示远远最广泛。
the most widely used 是过去分词短语用作表语。

expressions.text: by far the most widely used

sentences.sentence: It's a perfect fit for the style of tennis now played, where players tend to battle it out from the back of the court rather than coming to the net.
sentences.translation: 它非常适合如今的网球打法：球员往往从底线展开激烈对抗，而不是来到网前。

structure.text: It's a perfect fit for the style of tennis now played
where players tend to battle it out from the back of the court
rather than coming to the net

difficult_points: It 指 co-polyester。
now played 是过去分词短语，修饰 the style of tennis。
where 引导定语从句，说明这种打法的特点。
rather than 表示与来到网前的打法形成对比。

sentences.sentence: Studies indicate that the average spin from a co-polyester string is 25% greater than that from natural string or other synthetics.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，共聚酯线产生的平均旋转比天然线或其他合成线产生的旋转高25%。

structure.text: that the average spin from a co-polyester string is 25% greater than that from natural string or other synthetics
that from natural string or other synthetics

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明研究表明的内容。
25% greater than 是比较结构，表示高出25%。
第二个 that 代替 the average spin，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: In a sense, the development of co-polyester strings has revolutionised the game.
sentences.translation: 从某种意义上说，共聚酯线的发展已经彻底改变了这项运动。
difficult_points: In a sense 限定说法，表示从某个角度看。
has revolutionised 使用现在完成时，强调发展带来的现有影响。
the game 指网球运动。

sentences.sentence: However, many players go beyond these basic adjustments to the strings and make changes to the racket frame itself.
sentences.translation: 然而，许多球员不仅进行这些基础的线床调整，还会对球拍框本身做出改变。

structure.text: go beyond these basic adjustments to the strings
and make changes to the racket frame itself

difficult_points: However 引出从线床调整到拍框调整的转折。
go beyond 表示超出基础调整范围。
itself 强调改变对象是拍框本身。

sentences.sentence: For example, much of the serving power of US professional player Pete Sampras was attributed to the addition of four to five lead weights onto his rackets, and today many professionals have the weight adjusted during the manufacturing process.
sentences.translation: 例如，美国职业球员皮特·桑普拉斯的发球力量很大程度上被归因于在球拍上加装了四到五个铅配重，而如今许多职业球员会在制造过程中调整重量。

structure.text: much of the serving power of US professional player Pete Sampras
was attributed to the addition of four to five lead weights onto his rackets
and today many professionals have the weight adjusted during the manufacturing process

difficult_points: For example 引出对拍框重量调整的具体例子。
was attributed to 是被动结构，表示发球力量被归因于加配重。
have the weight adjusted 是使役结构，表示让重量在制造过程中被调整。
during the manufacturing process 限定调整发生的阶段。

sentences.sentence: Other changes to the frame involve the handle.
sentences.translation: 对拍框的其他改变涉及拍柄。
difficult_points: Other changes 承接上一段的拍框改装。
to the frame 修饰 changes，说明改变对象。
involve 表示涉及，不一定表示直接改变整个拍框。

sentences.sentence: Players have individual preferences for the shape of the handle and some will have the handle of one racket moulded onto the frame of a different racket.
sentences.translation: 球员对拍柄形状有个人偏好，有些人会把一支球拍的拍柄塑形到另一支球拍的拍框上。

structure.text: have individual preferences for the shape of the handle
and some will have the handle of one racket moulded onto the frame of a different racket
have the handle of one racket moulded

difficult_points: and 连接两个关于拍柄偏好的分句。
individual preferences for 表示对某特征有个人偏好。
have the handle...moulded 是使役结构，表示让拍柄被塑形到另一拍框上。
of one racket 与 of a different racket 对比，说明部件来自不同球拍。

sentences.sentence: Other players make different changes.
sentences.translation: 其他球员会做出不同的改变。
difficult_points: Other players 与前一句的 some 形成范围扩展。
different changes 表示接下来会举出另一类拍柄调整。
make changes 是固定搭配，表示做出改变。

sentences.sentence: The professional Portuguese player Gonçalo Oliveira replaced the original grips of his rackets with something thinner because they had previously felt uncomfortable to hold.
sentences.translation: 葡萄牙职业球员贡萨洛·奥利维拉把球拍原来的握把换成了更薄的东西，因为原来的握把之前握起来让他感觉不舒服。

structure.text: The professional Portuguese player Gonçalo Oliveira
replaced the original grips of his rackets with something thinner
because they had previously felt uncomfortable to hold
had previously felt uncomfortable to hold

difficult_points: replace...with... 表示用更薄的材料替换原握把。
because 引导原因状语从句，说明更换原因。
they 指代 the original grips。
had previously felt 使用过去完成时，表示更换前的感受。

sentences.sentence: Racket customisation and modification have pushed the standards of the game to greater levels that few could have anticipated in the days of natural strings and heavy, wooden frames, and it's exciting to see what further developments there will be in the future.
sentences.translation: 球拍定制和改装已经把这项运动的水准推向更高层次，而在天然线和沉重木质拍框的时代，几乎没有人能预料到这一点；未来还会出现哪些进一步发展，令人期待。

structure.text: have pushed the standards of the game to greater levels
that few could have anticipated in the days of natural strings and heavy, wooden frames
what further developments there will be in the future

difficult_points: have pushed 使用现在完成时，强调定制和改装对当下比赛水准的影响。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 greater levels。
few could have anticipated 表示过去几乎无人能够预料。
what further developments... 是宾语从句，作 see 的宾语。

expressions.text: push the standards of the game to greater levels
expressions.meaning_zh: 把比赛水准推向更高层次
